policy: Manual exclusions are used only for examples independently reviewed as bad or unusable pure-vs-fat training data. Built-in exclusions still omit topped and 1mm/borderline-fat examples from the v0 binary classifier.

manualExclusions.note: Explicit user review found this recording unsuitable as pure-vs-fat training signal.
Explicit user review found this recording unsuitable as pure-vs-fat training signal.
Explicit user review found this recording unsuitable as pure-vs-fat training signal.

builtInExclusionRules.description: Topped examples are held out until there is enough topped data for a real class.
1mm/borderline-fat examples are intentionally outside the clear pure-vs-fat v0 target.
Folder labels that do not contain pure or fat are not inferred.
Prepared shot rows without a labels.json entry are not inferred.
